full_text:
Sun Xiu (Zilie) 孫休 (子烈)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Xiu (孫休), styledZilie (子烈), was born in Wu. Overthrew Sun Chen but neglected state affairs. Wish for heirship ignored. Sun Xiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
